workshops.title: The Fabric of Remembering: Cyanotype & Quilting
workshops.address: 924 Lincoln Rd., First Floor, Miami Beach, FL 33139
workshops.summary: A three-week hands-on workshop with Bex McCharen exploring cyanotype printing on fabric, quilting, storytelling, and memory.
workshops.description: Join artist Bex McCharen for this three-week workshop exploring fabric as a vessel for memory, storytelling, and legacy. Participants will cyanotype print family photographs onto fabric, then piece, sew, and embellish the printed images into small quilted works. All skill levels welcome.
